description: trackRequestScratch uses WeakMap so scratch state is GC'd with the request; trackMetricBucket and trackTraceBucket use Map (acceptable for their bounded long-lived keys). Unifying onto Map for all three leaks one scratch object per served request.

findings.rationale: trackRequestScratch's store is a WeakMap; the other two use Map. WeakMap is load-bearing on the request path because request objects are short-lived and a Map retains them. Same structural shape, divergent constructor callee — escalate territory.
